channel.title: Recent page changes from site "SCP Foundation" (a Wikidot site)

item.title: "SCP-3211" - file action
item.description:
Page: SCP-3211 (scp-3211)
Current revision number: 81
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 06:10:44 +0000
Change type: file action
Change comments: Uploaded file "3211@2.0.1.js".
By: Croquembouche

Page content preview:
Info SCP-3211: There is No Canon Author: Croquembouche Hidden behind your phone or computer screen, you're usually safe from antimemetic SCPs. But 3211? No no no. 3211 is...

item.title: "Big Fish In The Sky" - source change
item.description:
Page: Big Fish In The Sky (big-fish-in-the-sky)
Current revision number: 10
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 05:16:45 +0000
Change type: source change
By: KirQ

Page content preview:
“Grandpa, could you tell me a story?” “Of course, my little princess. But make sure to brush your teeth before going to bed.” “I've already done it. Look, grandpa.” “Your teeth look just like pear...
item.content:encoded:
Page: Big Fish In The Sky (big-fish-in-the-sky)
Current revision number: 10
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 05:16:45 +0000
Change type: source change
By: KirQ

Page content preview:
“Grandpa, could you tell me a story?” “Of course, my little princess. But make sure to brush your teeth before going to bed.” “I've already done it. Look, grandpa.” “Your teeth look just like pear...

item.title: "SCP-1205" - source change
item.description:
Page: SCP-1205 (scp-1205)
Current revision number: 33
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 00:54:35 +0000
Change type: source change
Change comments: The incident report is consistently referred to as G everywhere but the collapsable, where it was C. This should be minor enough to just boldly fix
By: Gatemansgc

Page content preview:
SCP-1205 as of 7/██/██ Item #: SCP-1205 Object Class: Safe Special Containment Procedures: SCP-1205 should be kept in a windowless containment cell with low light, facing a surveillance camera....
item.content:encoded:
Page: SCP-1205 (scp-1205)
Current revision number: 33
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 00:54:35 +0000
Change type: source change
Change comments: The incident report is consistently referred to as G everywhere but the collapsable, where it was C. This should be minor enough to just boldly fix
By: Gatemansgc

Page content preview:
SCP-1205 as of 7/██/██ Item #: SCP-1205 Object Class: Safe Special Containment Procedures: SCP-1205 should be kept in a windowless containment cell with low light, facing a surveillance camera....
